title: Underground Fortress
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
The '''Underground Fortress''' was the military command center on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]].

Surface access to the fortress was made through a secret door that slid open in a rock face, located in a narrow canyon.

It was destroyed by [[Nuclear weapon/Legends|atomic warheads]] set off by the Aquilaeans themselves, to prevent the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] from gaining their genetic and biological secrets. All inside were [[Death/Legends|killed]], including [[King/Legends|Queen]] [[Breha Organa/Legends|Breha]]. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], her brothers and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who were outside the fortress, escaped to [[Gordon]].

==Behind the scenes==
The destruction of the fortress, though here a suicidal defense, was rewritten into the obliteration of [[Ogana Major]] in the second draft, and later became the basis for the fate of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].
